name: Ralsei the Fluffy Prince.
description:
Ralsei from DELTARUNE, not much else to say ngl.

Enjoy a nice cup of tea with Ralsei in intro 1, be a new Lightner in the Dark World in intro 2 or make your own scenario in intro 3!

I tried to make this one a bit more detailed compared to the other bots I've made, so do enjoy!

Art by akimaru_FA on Reddit I believe
creator: PhoenixKingII
